rationale: Already wired into Make/Pixi and tailored to UOGTO arXiv rules
acceptance_criterion: Manifest proves only required TeX bibliography style and figure files are retained

purpose: External cleaner for unused TeX/images comments and package size
rationale: Strong comparison tool but must not become authoritative until its deletions are reviewed
acceptance_criterion: Run in isolated output and compare removed/kept manifest with repo-native cleaner

rationale: Best local proxy for repeated arXiv-compatible TeX/BibTeX passes
acceptance_criterion: Cleaned package compiles with an arXiv-compatible processor or records missing engine blocker

purpose: LaTeX source linting for typographic and source issues
rationale: Useful warning source but noisy for scientific manuscripts
acceptance_criterion: Warnings are reviewed and either fixed or marked false positive

rationale: Useful second-pass lint with likely false positives
acceptance_criterion: Warnings are reviewed and either fixed or marked false positive

rationale: Complements repo-native SourceRight and citation-key checks
acceptance_criterion: Undefined unused or missing citations are fixed or explicitly justified

rationale: Useful to inspect expanded source but not necessarily upload format
acceptance_criterion: Expanded source audit finds no hidden included material or records blocker

purpose: Filter noisy TeX output to actionable messages
rationale: Improves CI log readability without changing build semantics
acceptance_criterion: Build logs expose actionable warnings/errors without hiding failures

purpose: Extract TeX log warnings and errors
rationale: Alternative or complement to texfot for log review
acceptance_criterion: Log analysis report records unresolved warnings and errors

rationale: Useful reproducibility check but not proof of arXiv TeX Live compatibility
acceptance_criterion: Tectonic result is recorded separately and never substitutes for latexmk/arXiv-compatible build
